header.title: Ledger Crash_Test
header.subtitle: Controlled adversarial simulation for SHA-256 blockchain integrity. Injects real hash corruption into the database, then verifies autonomous detection and Correction Block doctrine compliance.

doctrine.title: Correction Block Doctrine
doctrine.rule1: Rule 1: Past blocks are immutable. No hash is ever modified.
doctrine.rule2: Rule 2: On rupture, a SYSTEM_INTEGRITY_CORRECTION block is appended.
doctrine.rule3: Rule 3: Corrupted block remains as forensic evidence.
doctrine.rule4: Rule 4: New chain anchor is established from the correction block forward.
